tips: [Elis Whispers] {Never attempt to understand the miracles crafted by the gods.
[Elis Whispers] {Instruments of slaughter are often the finest ornaments.
[Elis Whispers] {Departing with purpose is far more praiseworthy than arriving uninvited.
[Elis Whispers] {It seems she has granted you the power to begin anew countless times.
[Elis Whispers] {Conquering a mirage holds no meaning for you.
[Elis Whispers] {You should not seek the truth hidden beneath the great black veil.
